title: Pomodoro Pro
shortDescription: Plan your day into focused time blocks, stay on track with a refined Mini HUD, and personalize every session with custom alerts, goals, streaks, and smart focus insights.
description:
Plan your day, run each focus block, and keep your timer exactly where you need it.
Pomodoro Pro is a modern focus timer for Windows with Pomodoro sessions, Time Blocking, daily goals, task tracking, and a refined floating Mini HUD.
Create reusable Time Blocking plans, add tasks with different durations, reorder blocks, and run your workday as a clear sequence instead of starting each session manually.
Customize focus, short break, and long break durations, control the timer from the system tray or Windows taskbar, and keep progress visible while you work.
Use custom notification sounds for focus, break, long break, and daily goal alerts. Choose from built-in sounds or use your own audio files.
Track your progress with daily, weekly, and monthly charts, build focus streaks, review top tasks, and export your session history to CSV.
With Quiet Hours, automatic logging, light/dark themes, taskbar progress, tray controls, and local data storage, Pomodoro Pro gives you a clean and reliable workspace for structured focus.
features: Time Blocking with reusable focus plans
Custom duration for each task block
Start a full task sequence with one click
Save, rename, reorder, and manage time-blocking plans
Floating Mini HUD for quick timer visibility
Daily Focus Goal with streak tracking
Task tagging for work, study, or projects
Smart history with daily, weekly, and monthly charts
Custom notification sounds for timer events
Built-in sound library with preview option
Support for custom MP3, WAV, and OGG sounds
Customizable focus, short break, and long break sessions
benefits: Stay focused with fewer context switches
Track progress and complete work with confidence
Built around time Blocking with reusable focus plans
Built around custom duration for each task block
Built around start a full task sequence with one click
